_doc: Items, evidence, and Casebook collectibles. Schema per item: { display_name (Design), description (Design), chapter, beat (Design), item_type, state_flag (Code — path pickup.gd writes on collect), argument_tags (Code — used by effectiveness resolver when item is played as evidence), stance_gate (optional — item only available if chapter1.client_meeting_stance matches) }. Pickup actor (scripts/actors/pickup.gd) uses item_id as key and state_flag_path as the flag it sets. Items keyed as object map so pickup.gd can look up by item_id.

procedural_binder.description: A lever-arch file so thoroughly annotated by Murrow that it has developed opinions of its own. Contains Article 135-bis § 2 KPC and adjacent provisions. Unlocks the defective-service argument in court.
procedural_binder._beat_note: Beat 4 — Murrow hands it over during the eviction briefing. Pickup node placed in the file area near Murrow's desk.
procedural_binder.pickup_line: The binder is heavier than it has any right to be. Murrow has flagged Article 135-bis in three colors.

rights_memo.description: A single-page note on fair-hearing procedure, drafted by Whimsy and further disfigured by a café ring stain. The coffee ring is, somehow, centered. Unlocks the fair-hearing argument in court.
rights_memo._beat_note: Beat 6–7 — Found at Café Paragraf, half-buried under Whimsy's notes. Collecting it is one of the two routes to recruiting Whimsy.
rights_memo.pickup_line: The memo is a single page. The coffee ring is, somehow, centered. Whimsy's handwriting is theatrical even in note form.

wojcik_witness_statement.description: A signed statement from the second-floor neighbor, resident since 1991, confirming that Halina Sikorska has been a continuous resident throughout. Bonus evidence — available only on the sympathetic stance.
wojcik_witness_statement._beat_note: Beat 8 — Surfaces during the client meeting on the sympathetic stance carrier. Halina produces it from her folder.
wojcik_witness_statement._state_flag_note: chapter1.bonus_evidence_collected is a string enum. Pickup sets it to 'wojcik_witness_statement'. Only one bonus item per playthrough.
wojcik_witness_statement._round_effect: Round 1 — adds character-witness texture; produces stronger judge reaction (react_round_1_sympathetic). Round 3 — witness texture for the harm done by improper hearing.
wojcik_witness_statement.pickup_line: Mrs. Wójcik has lived on the second floor since before the renumbering. She will testify. Her statement is two pages and unambiguous.

return_to_sender_slip.description: The returned envelope from a landlord letter sent six months earlier — also addressed to old number seven, also bounced. Proves the landlord knew the address was bad before the eviction notice. Bonus evidence — available only on the blunt-procedural stance.
return_to_sender_slip._beat_note: Beat 8 — Surfaces during the client meeting on the blunt-procedural stance carrier. Halina has kept everything.
return_to_sender_slip._state_flag_note: chapter1.bonus_evidence_collected is a string enum. Pickup sets it to 'return_to_sender_slip'. Only one bonus item per playthrough.
return_to_sender_slip._round_effect: Round 1 — knockout-style proof-of-knowledge; landlord's 'I didn't know' defense fails on its face (react_round_1_blunt_procedural). Round 3 — strengthens the wrongful-service finding underlying the remedy.
return_to_sender_slip.pickup_line: The envelope came back six months ago. Same wrong address. The landlord's countersignature is on the renewal. He knew.

lease_1962_inheritance_1987.description: The original flat assignment in Halina's father's name (Warsaw railway housing stock, 1962) and the inheritance documentation confirming succession of the tenancy (1987). Two documents, one chain. Bonus evidence — available only on the technical stance.
lease_1962_inheritance_1987._beat_note: Beat 8 — Surfaces during the client meeting on the technical stance carrier. Halina arrives with a folder; these are at the back of it.
lease_1962_inheritance_1987._state_flag_note: chapter1.bonus_evidence_collected is a string enum. Pickup sets it to 'lease_1962_inheritance_1987'. Only one bonus item per playthrough.
lease_1962_inheritance_1987._round_effect: Round 3 only — historical weight for the tenancy-validity argument supporting the rehearing-remedy ask (react_round_1_technical holds lease for Round 3). Judge adds one-clause acknowledgment that the underlying tenancy is not before the court (remedy_round_3_technical).
lease_1962_inheritance_1987.pickup_line: The 1962 assignment is her father's. The 1987 paperwork is the succession. The chain runs clean through both reorganizations.
